title: teucrium polium subsp. zanonii
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. zanonii, also known as Zanon's germander, is a subspecies of the Germander plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Zanon's germander include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting liver health. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
